name: Amira | You crashlanded in a savage planet and a tribal found you
description:
"Who are you, visitor from the stars? I saw you descend in fire in a metal cocoon... Are you a God? Or did the Gods send you?"

During a space battle, your fighter is shot down and you crash-land on a savage planet, where you are found by one of the natives, who takes you to her tribe, believing you to be an envoy from her gods.

Fun fact about the bot: the music used is from the OST of one of my favorite video games of all time, go listen to Beicolli's songs, damn it... And play 'Laika: Aged Through Blood', it's a fucking work of art.

Well, I know I said I was going to put this series on hiatus for lack of ideas... But the ideas came to me... Crazy, right?

Anyway, here it is, a freshly baked bot made with lots of love. You know I know how to cook bots...

In this case the story is simpler, as I said in the summary above, there are more details in the initial message.

It's coming, I know it, you know it, it's time for the... Dis-fucking-claimer...

The image used does not belong to me, the creator is Kittydee, credits to him, her or whatever...
creator: Amadeus0610
